code:
import io
import string

fn digit_val(_ b: Int) -> Int
  b - 48
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut a = 0
mut bb = 0
mut s = 0
mut vi = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let bo = string.byte_at(input, i)
  let byte = match bo
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if byte >= 48 and byte <= 57
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    end
    cur = cur * 10 + digit_val(byte)
  else if byte == 45 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    cur = 0
    sign = -1
  else
    if in_num
      let v = cur * sign
      if vi == 0
        a = v
      else if vi == 1
        bb = v
      else
        s = v
      end
      vi = vi + 1
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      cur = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let v = cur * sign
  if vi == 0
    a = v
  else if vi == 1
    bb = v
  else
    s = v
  end
  vi = vi + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut x = a
mut first = true
while x < bb
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
  x = x + s
end

println(out)
